title: Bridge Essay: Brain mechanisms in religion and spirituality: An integrative predictive process

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**Brain mechanisms in religion and spirituality: An integrative predictive processing framework.** — Neurosci Biobehav Rev. PMID: 28041787. DOI: 10.1016/j.neubiorev.2016.12.031. We present the theory of predictive processing as aunifying framework to account for the neurocognitive basis of religion and spirituality. Our model is substantiated by discussing four different brain mechanisms that play akey role in religion and spirituality: temporal brain areas are associated with religious visions and ecstatic experiences; multisensory brain areas and the default mode network are involved in self-transcendent experiences; the Theory of Mind-network is associated with pra...

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-12. Phase 16 (Visionary Cosmologies). Evaluation: Good (score=2.1)
